name: @stackra/pwa
purpose: Production PWA runtime + build toolkit — install prompts, service-worker updates, standalone detection, Web Share, Wake Lock, and vite-plugin-pwa options.
capabilities: UTM attribution + Web Share + Vibration + Wake Lock
QR-code install helper + splash screen + PwaHead meta
when_to_use: Turning a Vite React app into an installable PWA with update prompts, share, and platform-aware install UX.
when_not_to_use: For pure service-worker authoring use Workbox directly; for background sync use @stackra/sync.
